candidates.why: Direct top-line revenue label; preferred over duplicate total row.
Duplicate total revenue line with identical values; useful as fallback if label changes by year.
COGS, not revenue.

candidates.why: Appears to be a component of other income/revenue, not the main top-line line.
Financial income, not operating revenue.
Bottom-line comprehensive income, not revenue.
Balance sheet asset, not revenue.
Balance sheet liability, not revenue.
Liability/deferred income, not reported top-line revenue.

variables.notes: Using revenue labels as a priority list, with the direct line first and the duplicate total as fallback.

candidates.why: Direct COGS line and more granular than the total cost of revenues row.
Inventory component on balance sheet, not income statement expense.
Total cost-of-revenues line, but a more direct COGS row exists.

candidates.why: Classic SG&A component.
Classic SG&A component.
Best available overhead bucket; included because there is no clear explicit SG&A subtotal.
Balance sheet asset, not income statement SG&A expense.
Balance sheet asset rollforward item, not SG&A expense.
Balance sheet accrual detail, not reported income statement overhead expense line.
Balance sheet liability, not SG&A.

candidates.row_label: Amortization of Capitalized Research & Development Expenses - Supplemental
candidates.why: Amortization supplemental line, not a dedicated current-period R&D operating expense.
Balance sheet asset, not income statement R&D expense.
Balance sheet asset detail, not income statement R&D expense.

candidates.row_label: Research & Development Costs - Accumulated Amortization & Impairment
candidates.why: Balance sheet contra-asset, not current-period R&D expense.
Not R&D expense.

variables.notes: No suitable dedicated R&D expense line is present on the income statement. The only R&D-related income-statement row is supplemental amortization of capitalized R&D, which should not be used as XRD.

candidates.why: Net finance cost line for 2025; closest available recurring finance-cost label.
Recurring finance expense, but the label appears twice and may not isolate all interest cost cleanly.
Specific recurring interest component, but incomplete as a standalone measure of total interest expense.
Net finance costs line for earlier years; closest available recurring finance-cost label.
Another net finance label, but values suggest possible inclusion of non-interest items in some years.

candidates.row_label: Interest Expense on Financial Lease Liabilities - Supplemental
candidates.why: Specific interest component only; incomplete as total interest expense.
Balance sheet liability, not interest expense.

variables.notes: Used the single net finance cost line rather than combining totals and components, to avoid double counting. This is the best recurring finance-cost row available across most years, though it may include some non-interest finance items.

candidates.row_label: Total comprehensive profit/loss attributable to Parent Company shareholders
candidates.why: Income statement comprehensive income, not book equity.

candidates.row_label: Equity attributable to parent companys owners

Acceptable fallback, but less preferred than parent-only equity.
Balancing row, not a reported equity line.

candidates.row_label: Balancing Item - Total Liability and Equity
candidates.why: Balancing row, not equity.
Total assets/liabilities+equity, not equity alone.

final_choice.row_label: Equity attributable to parent companys owners

variables.notes: Preferred parent-owner equity line to exclude any non-controlling interests from BE.
No minority interest/non-controlling interest line appears on the balance sheet preview.
